title: RuneCraftory
body:
![Banner](https://imgur.com/6I8Lwxt.png)

## 🌸 RuneCraftory A Rune Factory inspired mod Looking for a blend of farming, fantasy, and adventure? RuneCraft brings the charm of Rune Factory into your Minecraft world! Grow seasonal crops, fight and tame monsters and build relationships with NPCs. This mod includes an in-game **Guidebook** to help you along the way. To access the book you need. - For 1.18: [Pathouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) - Otherwise: [Modopedia](https://modrinth.com/mod/modopedia) ## 📖 Features - An extensive farming experience with lots of crops and trees, changing seasons etc. - Multiple new weapon types coupled with a custom combat system and animation - Lots of new (tameable) monster and bosses with unique drops - New crafting tables to make various gear and items - NPCs to interact and befriend with. No more boring villagers! - A leveling and skill system to increase your stats ## 🐉 Monsters Unlike vanilla minecraft monsters appear exclusively through gates that spawn all over the world. These gate act as spawners and will continue spawning monsters unless the gate is destroyed. Monsters can be **tamed** with the correct conditions. ![](https://imgur.com/4jPoGjF.png) You might also come across structures where some stronger monsters can appear ![](https://imgur.com/wkKmMPx.png) ![](https://imgur.com/Ur8T4AS.png) ![](https://imgur.com/uzvpymV.png) ## 🪚 Crafting 4 new crafting tables are added where you can craft various items: - **The Forge**: For all your offensive needs - **The Accessory Bench**: For all your defensive needs - **The Pharmacy**: Allows you to craft various potions - **The Cooking Table**: Create all your culinary items here ![](https://imgur.com/04eZ6uW.png) ## ⚔️ Weapons 9 types of weapons each with different properties are added: ![](https://imgur.com/JFajRYa.png) > **Shortswords** > **Longsword** > **Spear** > **Axe** > **Hammer** > **Dual blades:** > **Fists** > **Staffs** > **Farming tools** ## 🪄 Rune points Rune points are a very important aspect of the mod. Various action now require the use of rune points. If you run out, you'll start to use your **HP** for these tasks so pay attention. The player can refresh their rune points by sleeping and eating. ## Missing features Not all features from the game have been implemented yet. Following features are still missing: - Events with npc, Town Festivals - Dungeons
